live_mode.description: This field will be true if this object exists in the live environment or false if it exists in the test environment.

type.description: The type of the payment action. Determines the action to be taken.

status.description: The current status of the payment action. One of `pending`, `processing`, `sent`, `acknowledged`, `cancelled`, or `failed`.

actionable_id.description: The ID of the associated actionable object.

actionable_type.description: The type of the associated actionable object. One of `payment_order`, `expected_payment`.

internal_account_id.description: The ID of the internal account associated with the payment action.

details.description: The specifc details of the payment action based on type.
